arts.ttl: LIVE: Title-chasing Arsenal host Leicester City
arts.sum: David Raya and Jurrien Timber overcome injury concerns to start for Arsenal - follow for live updates from the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'willing' to make SHOCK January transfer
arts.sum: Brazilian outlet Bola has claimed that Arsenal are ready to sell Jesus in January, with the forward’s former club Palmeiras keen to sign him for €40m. Palmeiras are understood to see Jesus as a ‘dream’ target due to his links with the club and a transfer would enable the Brazilian giants to have a heavyweight striker in place for their 2025 Club World Cup push.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Arsenal as Facundo Buonanotte decision made amid two changes
arts.sum: The other change was expected with Oliver Skipp coming in for Bilal El Khannouss, and Wilfred Ndidi pushing back into attacking midfield. City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Okoli, Kristiansen; Winks, Skipp; Buonanotte, Ndidi, Mavididi; Vardy.

arts.ttl: David Raya starts as Arteta names Arsenal starting XI
arts.sum: David Raya has been named to start for Arsenal for their Premier League meeting with Leicester City today. The Spanish goalkeeper was a doubt heading into the game after sustaining what Mikel Arteta described as a “muscle injury” in last Sunday’s 2-2 draw with Manchester City. 16-year-old Jack Porter stepped into the starting lineup for […] The post David Raya starts as Arteta names Arsenal starting XI first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal icon Jens Lehmann handed jaw-dropping fine for chainsaw attack on neighbour's garage
arts.sum: Jens Lehmann received a fine and came to an agreement with his neighbour after standing accused of damaging a garage with a chainsaw in his hometown of Starnburg

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper warns Leicester City not to repeat mistake Arsenal have made
arts.sum: When Leicester City take on Arsenal on Saturday afternoon, Steve Cooper will be giving his players a special instruction: don’t kick the ball away. “But what we’ve got to make sure we don’t do is kick the ball away on fouls.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Leicester - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Mikel Arteta's side look to build on draw plus updates from the rest of Saturday's 3pm kick-offs
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Arsenal host Leicester plus get the latest from the rest of Saturday's 3pm kick-offs.

arts.ttl: Jorginho and Thomas Partey drop Arsenal team news hint as Mikel Arteta makes David Raya claim
arts.sum: Jorginho and Thomas Partey has dropped early team news hints ahead of Arsenal's clash against Leicester City. One player who may not feature against Steve Cooper's side is David Raya; speaking to reporters ahead of the match, Arteta kept his cards close to his chest when he was asked for an update on the goalkeeper, who's been nursing an injury.

arts.ttl: Arsenal rival Troy Deeney has his say on Mikel Arteta tactics: 'Give me a break!'
arts.sum: Former Premier League striker Troy Deeney has weighed in on the debate about Arsenal's use of football's 'dark arts' in their 2-2 draw against rivals Manchester City

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal loanee dies from a heart attack aged 46 as clubs pay tribute to the forward
arts.sum: During his sole season in north London Caballero would feature mainly for the club's reserve side, making three appearances in all competitions for the first team.
